seo.title: BornoMess Manager — Smart Mess & Hostel Management
seo.description: BornoMess Manager by BornoSoft — manage meals, bazaar, rent, bills, deposits, members and accounts in one place.

1.q: Can I use it on mobile?
1.a: Yes. MessFlow Pro is fully responsive and works like a native app in mobile browsers.

2.a: Yes. Monthly reports can be downloaded in PDF, Excel and CSV formats.

3.a: Your data is stored over encrypted connections with full mess-level isolation.

4.a: Choose a plan, submit payment request. Subscription activates after approval.

5.a: Yes. bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Upay and bank transfer are supported.

6.q: How many members can I add?
6.a: Member limits depend on your plan. Higher plans allow more members.

7.a: Yes. Create and manage multiple messes from one account.

8.a: Basic meal, expense, deposit tracking and monthly reports on the free plan.

9.q: Can members see their own accounts?
9.a: Yes. Each member can view their meals, deposits and dues in the portal.

10.a: Yes. Mess owners can assign a new manager anytime.

11.a: Install as PWA. Some data is viewable offline and syncs when online.

12.a: Yes. Full Bangla interface and reports are supported.

13.a: Selected plans include trial benefits. See pricing for details.

14.a: Email and in-app help center. Priority support on Pro plans.

15.a: Yes. Export reports and lists as CSV, Excel and PDF.

16.a: Yes. Enterprise custom plans for large hostels and institutions.
